my-workspace/server/src/main/java/com/my.general_idea: Replace javax.annotation import with jakarta.annotation to align with Jakarta EE 9+ standards required by newer Spring Boot versions.
Update the generated annotation comment to reflect the new JHipster version.
Replace javax.annotation with jakarta.annotation to align with Jakarta EE namespace changes in Spring Boot 3.
Rename logger instance from 'log' to 'LOG' to follow standard Java naming conventions for static final fields.
Use Java 17 text blocks for multi-line string literals to improve readability.
Extract property retrieval into a local variable to avoid repeated calls and improve clarity.
Replace ternary operator with String.valueOf to prevent NullPointerException if e.getCause() returns null in the production logging branch.
Introduce a nested static class to encapsulate Liquibase-specific configuration properties.
my-workspace/server/src/main/java/com/my.human_impl: public static class Liquibase { private Boolean asyncStart = true; ... }

my-workspace/server/src/main/java/com/my.general_idea: Add a field and getter for the new Liquibase configuration object in the main properties class.
my-workspace/server/src/main/java/com/my.human_impl: private final Liquibase liquibase = new Liquibase(); public Liquibase getLiquibase() { return liquibase; }

my-workspace/server/src/main/java/com/my.general_idea: Migrate logger instance from a private final field to a private static final field to follow standard Java logging conventions.
my-workspace/server/src/main/java/com/my.human_impl: Changed 'private final Logger log' to 'private static final Logger LOG' and updated usage.

my-workspace/server/src/main/java/com/my.general_idea: Added import for java.util.List to support the new marker list handling logic.
Added class-level Javadoc explaining the security purpose of the CRLF log converter.
Renamed SAFE_LOGGERS to SAFE_LOGS and expanded the list of safe loggers to include Spring Boot auto-configuration and diagnostics.
Updated marker checking logic to use getMarkerList() instead of getMarker() to correctly handle marker containment in newer SLF4J versions.
Remove the LOGIN_REGEX constant from the Constants class.
my-workspace/server/src/main/java/com/my.human_impl: Deleted the line defining public static final String LOGIN_REGEX.

my-workspace/server/src/main/java/com/my.general_idea: Remove unused import for org.slf4j.Logger.
Remove unused import for org.slf4j.LoggerFactory.
Remove unused import for org.springframework.context.annotation.Bean.
Remove unused import for tech.jhipster.config.JHipsterConstants.
Replace Hibernate5Module with Hibernate6Module to align with the Hibernate 6 dependency required for Java 17 migration.
my-workspace/server/src/main/java/com/my.human_impl: import com.fasterxml.jackson.datatype.hibernate6.Hibernate6Module; ... public Hibernate6Module hibernate6Module() { return new Hibernate6Module(); }

my-workspace/server/src/main/java/com/my.general_idea: Configure Hibernate6Module to serialize identifiers for lazy-loaded objects, adapting to API changes in the new module.
Remove Zalando Problem and ConstraintViolationProblem Jackson modules, likely due to dependency removal or replacement.
my-workspace/server/src/main/java/com/my.human_impl: Removed imports and beans for ProblemModule and ConstraintViolationProblemModule.

my-workspace/server/src/main/java/com/my.general_idea: Add a custom serializer for LocalTime to ensure consistent string serialization format.
Changed logger instance from private final field to private static final field following standard Java logging conventions.
Added ApplicationProperties as a constructor argument to allow configuration-driven behavior for Liquibase startup.
Implemented conditional logic to choose between async and sync Liquibase initialization based on application properties.
Updated setContexts call to convert List to comma-delimited String and added null/empty check using CollectionUtils.
Replaced setLabels with setLabelFilter, converting List to comma-delimited String and adding null/empty check.
Replaced deprecated Environment.acceptsProfiles(Profiles.of(...)) with Environment.matchesProfiles(...) for profile checking.
Remove the password grant type from the OAuth2 authorized client provider configuration.
Replace deprecated Spring Security 5 annotations with Spring Security 6 equivalents to support Java 17 migration.
Update servlet imports from javax to jakarta namespace required for Spring Boot 3/Java 17.
my-workspace/server/src/main/java/com/my.human_impl: Changed imports from javax.servlet.http to jakarta.servlet.http.

my-workspace/server/src/main/java/com/my.general_idea: Migrate from deprecated antMatchers to requestMatchers using MvcRequestMatcher for type-safe URL matching.
my-workspace/server/src/main/java/com/my.human_impl: Replaced .antMatchers() calls with .requestMatchers(mvc.pattern(...)) and injected MvcRequestMatcher.Builder.

my-workspace/server/src/main/java/com/my.general_idea: Adopt Spring Security 6 lambda DSL for configuring security components.
my-workspace/server/src/main/java/com/my.human_impl: Replaced .and() chaining with lambda expressions like .csrf(csrf -> ...) and .authorizeHttpRequests(authz -> ...).

my-workspace/server/src/main/java/com/my.general_idea: Remove dependency on Zalando Problem Spring Web Advice security support which is likely incompatible or removed.
my-workspace/server/src/main/java/com/my.human_impl: Removed SecurityProblemSupport field, constructor argument, and exception handling configuration.

my-workspace/server/src/main/java/com/my.general_idea: Switch from manual CorsFilter injection to Spring Security's built-in CORS support.
my-workspace/server/src/main/java/com/my.human_impl: Removed CorsFilter field and .addFilterBefore(), replaced with .cors(withDefaults()).

my-workspace/server/src/main/java/com/my.general_idea: Configure custom OIDC user service for OAuth2 login to handle user info endpoint.
Update CSRF configuration to use SpaCsrfTokenRequestHandler for modern SPA compatibility.
Add security rule to restrict access to OpenAPI documentation endpoints.
Clean up imports no longer needed after removing deprecated features and Zalando support.
my-workspace/server/src/main/java/com/my.human_impl: Removed imports for HttpMethod, Import, EnableWebSecurity, EnableGlobalMethodSecurity, SecurityProblemSupport, etc.
